visual_summary: A card component with a lens feature that can overlay an image. A developer would use this to display interactive content in a unique way.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics: Name: Lens Demo 3 Description: A card component with a lens feature that can overlay an image. A developer would use this to display interactive content in a unique way. Style: modern, dark Interactions: clickable, hover Tags: card, interactive, overlay, image Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
